column3: Three meals a day is all the food you really need.
Most dieticians  discourage a diet heavy in meat.
You should never go to bed with a heavy meal in your stomach.
Your day should start off right - healthy, nutritious and satisfying.
You need to take your time when you have a meal.
We must be careful when eating oily or sugary food.
Some dieticians recommended eating several small meals a day.
